title: Fix with clause handling in functions
body:
Array query methods with `with` clause don't work when they are used in functions. It is because `AstWith` node isn't added to the symbol table when it is under a function (because children of functions aren't visited). Then `LinkDotResolveVisitor` expects that `AstWith` node is present in the symbol table.
I fixed it by adding the children iteration to functions. I think that the problem would occur also in other nodes that are added to the symbol table and may be both under a function and a module.
